author: nprime06
name: PR #1736 + Polar Express NS + MIN_LR + Sparse Attention Gate + Fused CE
blurb: Stacks four orthogonal wins on top of #1736: Polar Express per-iteration Newton-Schulz coefficients for Muon (from PR #1344), a narrow sparse attention head-output gate (modded-nanogpt-style, 96 params/layer vs dense 4096), a Triton fused softcapped cross-entropy kernel on the training forward, and a LR warmdown floor (MIN_LR=0.10). Plus three polish tweaks: tight GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=0.5, disabled mid-training val, and widened attn_gate_w quant-route to int8-per-row. All four wins were ablation-validated on top of stock #1736 seed 0 before stacking.
reproducibility_notes: Run prepare_caseops_data.py once to tokenize CaseOps-transformed FineWeb + emit per-token byte sidecar, then run train_gpt.py per seed as documented in README.md. Identical tokenizer and data layout to PR #1736.
